languages.text: "Я... вырвалась, {name}. Когда начался обстрел, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносам{/g} резко стало не до меня. Я бежала в галереи, дальше и дальше, искала способ покинуть это место, но..."{n}Лария заходится кашлем и сплевывает несколько кровавых сгустков.{/n} "Не учла, что здесь есть и другие беглецы. Слуги {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Архиврага{/g}, уничтоженные вами, схватили меня. Последствия можете видеть сами".

traits.locale_text: "Я... вырвалась, {name}. Когда начался обстрел, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносам{/g} резко стало не до меня. Я бежала в галереи, дальше и дальше, искала способ покинуть это место, но..."{n}Лария заходится кашлем и сплевывает несколько кровавых сгустков.{/n} "Не учла, что здесь есть и другие беглецы. Слуги {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Архиврага{/g}, уничтоженные вами, схватили меня и истязали много часов. Последствия можете видеть сами".

languages.text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

"I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a fit of coughing and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not account for the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me and tortured me for hours. The results, you can see for yourself."

I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

languages.text: “我……逃出来了，{name}。轰炸开始后，那些{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}便无暇顾及我了。我逃进展厅，越逃越深，拼命想找到逃出这地方的方法，可……”{n}菈丽雅突然剧烈咳嗽，吐了好几口血块。{/n}“我没料到此处还有别的逃亡者。那些侍奉{g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}混沌大敌{/g}的仆从，就是你们消灭的那群，他们抓住了我。至于结果，你们都看到了。”
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

traits.locale_text: “我……逃出来了，{name}。轰炸开始后，那些{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}便无暇顾及我了。我逃进展厅，越逃越深，拼命想找到逃出这地方的方法，可……”{n}菈丽雅突然剧烈咳嗽，吐了好几口血块。{/n}“我没料到此处还有别的逃亡者。那些侍奉{g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}混沌大敌{/g}的仆从，就是你们消灭的那群，他们抓住了我。至于结果，你们都看到了。”

languages.text: «Me he... escapado, {name}. Cuando ha comenzado el bombardeo, los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} ya no tenían tiempo para mí. He huido por las galerías, alejándome cada vez más en busca de una salida de este lugar, pero...». {n}A Laria le da un ataque de tos que expulsa varios coágulos de sangre.{/n} «No contaba con los otros fugitivos. Los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archienemigo{/g}, a quienes han destruido. Me han capturado. Los resultados son evidentes».
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

traits.locale_text: «Me he... escapado, {name}. Cuando ha comenzado el bombardeo, los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} ya no tenían tiempo para mí. He huido por las galerías, alejándome cada vez más en busca de una salida de este lugar, pero...». {n}A Laria le da un ataque de tos que expulsa varios coágulos de sangre.{/n} «No contaba con los otros fugitivos. Los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archienemigo{/g}, a quienes han destruido. Me han capturado. Los resultados son evidentes».

languages.text: « Je... je me suis échappée, {name}. Lorsque les bombardements ont commencé, les {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} ont cessé de s'intéresser à moi. J'ai fui à travers les galeries, toujours plus loin, à la recherche d'une issue, mais... » {n}Laria est prise d'une quinte de toux et crache quelques caillots de sang.{/n} « Je n'ai pas pu tenir compte des autres fugitifs. Les serviteurs du {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Grand Ennemi{/g}, ceux que vous avez anéantis, m'ont capturée. Voyez le résultat par vous-mêmes. »
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

J'ai fui à travers les galeries, toujours plus loin, à la recherche d'une issue, mais... » {n}Laria est prise d'une quinte de toux et crache quelques caillots de sang.{/n} « Je n'ai pas pu tenir compte des autres fugitifs. Les serviteurs du {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Grand Ennemi{/g}, ceux que vous avez anéantis, m'ont capturée. Voyez le résultat par vous-mêmes. »

languages.text: "Ben... Kurtuldum. Bombardıman başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} artık benimle ilgilenecek vakti kalmadı. Buradan kaçmanın bir yolunu arayarak galerilerin derinliklerine, daha da derinliklerine kaçtım ama..." {n}Laria, öksürük krizine tutuluyor ve birkaç kan pıhtısı tükürüyor.{/n} "Buradaki diğer kaçakları hesaba katmamıştım. {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Şerbaşı'nın{/g} o yok ettiğiniz hizmetkârları beni yakaladı. Sonuçlarını kendin görebiliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Kurtuldum. Bombardıman başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} artık benimle ilgilenecek vakti kalmadı. Buradan kaçmanın bir yolunu arayarak galerilerin derinliklerine, daha da derinliklerine kaçtım ama..." {n}Laria, öksürük krizine tutuluyor ve birkaç kan pıhtısı tükürüyor.{/n} "Buradaki diğer kaçakları hesaba katmamıştım. {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Şerbaşı'nın{/g} o yok ettiğiniz hizmetkârları beni yakaladı. Sonuçlarını kendin görebiliyorsun."

languages.text: "Ich ... bin ausgebrochen, {name}. Als das Bombardement begann, hatte der {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} keine Zeit mehr für mich. Ich floh in die Galerien, immer weiter und weiter, auf der Suche nach einem Ausweg, aber ..." {n}Laria wird von einem Hustenanfall geschüttelt und spuckt blutigen Schleim aus.{/n} "Auf die anderen Flüchtigen hier konnte ich nicht zählen. Die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Erzfeindes{/g}, die Ihr vernichtet habt ... sie haben mich gefangen genommen. Ihr seht selbst, mit welchem Ergebnis."
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. Die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Erzfeindes{/g}, die Ihr vernichtet habt ... sie haben mich gefangen genommen. Ihr seht selbst, mit welchem Ergebnis."

languages.text: 「私は…逃げ出した、{name}。砲撃が始まった時、{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異種族{/g}は私をもう必要としなかった。私は、この場所から脱出する方法を探しながら、ギャラリーをさらに深く進んでいったが…」{n}ラリアは咳き込み、血の塊を吐き出す。{/n}「しかし、ここに逃げてきた他の者たちを予想していなかった。{g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}敵神{/g}のしもべ、君が破壊した者たちが私を捕らえた。その結果、君が見ているとおりだ。」
languages.original_text: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."
